SELECT value, signbit(value) AS signbit_value FROM test_signbit;
SELECT a.value, b.number, signbit(a.value) AS signbit_a, signbit(b.number) AS signbit_b FROM test_signbit a JOIN other_values b ON a.value < b.number;
SELECT DISTINCT signbit(value) AS signbit_value FROM test_signbit WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(value) AS average_value, signbit(AVG(value)) AS signbit_avg FROM test_signbit;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS negative_count, signbit(value) AS signbit FROM test_signbit GROUP BY signbit(value);
SELECT CASE WHEN signbit(value) = 1 THEN 'Negative' ELSE 'Non-Negative' END AS sign_indicator FROM test_signbit;
SELECT signbit(value + 2.0) FROM test_signbit WHERE value < -3.0;
